1вҶ’# HQ - Harness Orchestrator & Dashboard
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’## Vision
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’**HQ** (Headquarters) is a native desktop application that provides a visual dashboard for managing AI agent development sessions. It enables developers to orchestrate, monitor, and control multiple Claude Code sessions across different projects without using a terminal.
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’## Important Distinction: Three Separate Concepts
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’Understanding HQ requires separating three distinct concepts:
    10вҶ’
    11вҶ’| Concept | What It Is | Example |
    12вҶ’|---------|------------|---------|
    13вҶ’| **Harness (method)** | A pattern for AI agents to work on long tasks across sessions via state files | `.harness/progress.txt` + `features.json` |
    14вҶ’| **HQ in development** | This project is being BUILT using the Harness method | The `.harness/` folder in THIS repo |
    15вҶ’| **HQ as product** | Once built, HQ will MANAGE other projects that use Harness | Visual dashboard for external projects |
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’**Key insight:** The `.harness/` folder here is for building HQ itself. When HQ is complete, it will open and visualize `.harness/` folders from OTHER projects.
    18вҶ’
    19вҶ’---
    20вҶ’
    21вҶ’## Core Philosophy
    22вҶ’
    23вҶ’> "A Single Pane of Glass for AI-Assisted Development"
    24вҶ’
    25вҶ’HQ transforms the way developers interact with long-running AI agents by providing:
    26вҶ’- **Visual Kanban boards** for feature tracking
    27вҶ’- **Real-time logs** from all running processes
    28вҶ’- **PTY-based process control** with full interactivity
    29вҶ’- **Multi-project management** via tabs
    30вҶ’- **Harness state visualization**
    31вҶ’
    32вҶ’---

    51вҶ’в”Ӯ                       Rust Backend (Tauri)                           в”Ӯ

    57вҶ’в”Ӯ                                                                      в”Ӯ
    58вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө

    65вҶ’в”Ӯ                                                                      в”Ӯ
    66вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
    67вҶ’```
    68вҶ’
    69вҶ’---
    70вҶ’
    71вҶ’## Technology Stack
    72вҶ’
    73вҶ’| Layer                | Technology          | Version | Purpose                              |
    74вҶ’|----------------------|---------------------|---------|--------------------------------------|
    75вҶ’| **Desktop Runtime**  | Tauri               | 2.x     | Native app shell, Rust backend       |
    76вҶ’| **Frontend**         | React               | 19.x    | UI framework                         |
    77вҶ’| **UI Components**    | PatternFly          | 6.x     | Enterprise UI (chat, terminal, logs) |
    78вҶ’| **State Management** | @zazcart/tools      | 0.1.0   | State machine + schema validation    |
    79вҶ’| **PTY Emulation**    | portable-pty (Rust) | latest  | Process spawning and control         |
    80вҶ’| **File Watching**    | notify (Rust)       | latest  | Real-time harness file changes       |
    81вҶ’| **IPC**              | Tauri Commands      | -       | Frontend вҶ” Backend communication     |
    82вҶ’
    83вҶ’### Why PatternFly 6?
    84вҶ’
    85вҶ’PatternFly provides ready-made components for our use cases:
    86вҶ’- **Chat/AI components** - For agent communication UI
    87вҶ’- **Log viewer** - Real-time log display with ANSI support
    88вҶ’- **Terminal** - Embedded terminal views
    89вҶ’- **Tabs** - Multi-project navigation
    90вҶ’- **Cards/Panels** - Kanban board layout
    91вҶ’- **Dark theme** - Built-in dark mode support
    92вҶ’
    93вҶ’---
    94вҶ’
    95вҶ’## Feature Specifications
    96вҶ’
    97вҶ’### F001: Multi-Project Tab Management
    98вҶ’
    99вҶ’**Description:** Open and manage multiple projects simultaneously via tabs.
   100вҶ’
   101вҶ’**UI Elements:**
   102вҶ’- Tab bar at top (PatternFly Tabs)
   103вҶ’- New tab button (+)
   104вҶ’- Close tab button (X)
   105вҶ’- Tab context menu (rename, close others, close all)
   106вҶ’
   107вҶ’**Behavior:**
   108вҶ’- Each tab represents a project directory
   109вҶ’- Tab title shows project name (from package.json or folder name)
   110вҶ’- Active tab is highlighted
   111вҶ’- Tabs are reorderable via drag-and-drop
   112вҶ’
   113вҶ’### F002: Kanban Board View
   114вҶ’
   115вҶ’**Description:** Visual kanban board for feature tracking within a project.
   116вҶ’
   117вҶ’**Columns:**
   118вҶ’```
   119вҶ’BACKLOG вҶ’ TODO вҶ’ DOING вҶ’ REVIEW вҶ’ QA вҶ’ DONE
   120вҶ’```
   121вҶ’
   122вҶ’**Card Structure:**
   123вҶ’- Feature ID (e.g., F001)
   124вҶ’- Title
   125вҶ’- Description (truncated)
   126вҶ’- Status badge
   127вҶ’- Priority indicator
   128вҶ’- Click to expand details
   129вҶ’
   130вҶ’**Data Source:**
   131вҶ’- Reads from `.harness/features.json`
   132вҶ’- Auto-updates when file changes (via file watcher)
   133вҶ’- Status mapped to columns:
   134вҶ’  - `passes: false` + not started вҶ’ BACKLOG
   135вҶ’  - `passes: false` + priority вҶ’ TODO
   136вҶ’  - `passes: false` + in_progress вҶ’ DOING
   137вҶ’  - `passes: false` + needs_review вҶ’ REVIEW
   138вҶ’  - `passes: false` + testing вҶ’ QA
   139вҶ’  - `passes: true` вҶ’ DONE
   140вҶ’
   141вҶ’### F003: Real-Time Log Panel
   142вҶ’
   143вҶ’**Description:** Live output from running processes (Claude Code, servers, etc.)
   144вҶ’
   145вҶ’**Features:**
   146вҶ’- PatternFly LogViewer component
   147вҶ’- ANSI color support
   148вҶ’- Timestamp prefix
   149вҶ’- Process filter
   150вҶ’- Search within logs
   151вҶ’- Clear button
   152вҶ’- Auto-scroll toggle
   153вҶ’
   154вҶ’**Technical:**
   155вҶ’- PTY streams вҶ’ Tauri events вҶ’ React state
   156вҶ’- Max 10,000 lines per process (ring buffer)
   157вҶ’
   158вҶ’### F004: PTY Process Controller
   159вҶ’
   160вҶ’**Description:** Spawn, control, and interact with shell processes.
   161вҶ’
   162вҶ’**Capabilities:**
   163вҶ’- Start new process (e.g., `claude` command)
   164вҶ’- Send keystrokes (including Ctrl+C, Ctrl+D)
   165вҶ’- Resize PTY on window resize
   166вҶ’- Kill process
   167вҶ’- Restart process
   168вҶ’
   169вҶ’**Rust Implementation:**
   170вҶ’```rust
   171вҶ’use portable_pty::{CommandBuilder, PtySize, native_pty_system};
   172вҶ’
   173вҶ’fn spawn_process(cmd: &str, cols: u16, rows: u16) -> Result<PtyPair> {
   174вҶ’    let pty_system = native_pty_system();
   175вҶ’    let pair = pty_system.openpty(PtySize { rows, cols, .. })?;
   176вҶ’    let cmd = CommandBuilder::new(cmd);
   177вҶ’    pair.slave.spawn_command(cmd)?;
   178вҶ’    Ok(pair)
   179вҶ’}
   180вҶ’```
   181вҶ’
   182вҶ’### F005: Harness State Visualization
   183вҶ’
   184вҶ’**Description:** Display current harness state visually.
   185вҶ’
   186вҶ’**Components:**
   187вҶ’- Progress summary card
   188вҶ’  - Features completed / total
   189вҶ’  - Current session info
   190вҶ’  - Last commit
   191вҶ’- Active feature highlight
   192вҶ’- Session timeline (from progress.txt)
   193вҶ’
   194вҶ’### F006: Project Selector Dialog
   195вҶ’
   196вҶ’**Description:** Open new project from file system.
   197вҶ’

# HQ - Harness Orchestrator & Dashboard

## Vision

**HQ** (Headquarters) is a native desktop application that provides a visual dashboard for managing AI agent development sessions. It enables developers to orchestrate, monitor, and control multiple Claude Code sessions across different projects without using a terminal.

## Important Distinction: Three Separate Concepts

Understanding HQ requires separating three distinct concepts:

| Concept | What It Is | Example |
|---------|------------|---------|
| **Harness (method)** | A pattern for AI agents to work on long tasks across sessions via state files | `.harness/progress.txt` + `features.json` |
| **HQ in development** | This project is being BUILT using the Harness method | The `.harness/` folder in THIS repo |
| **HQ as product** | Once built, HQ will MANAGE other projects that use Harness | Visual dashboard for external projects |

**Key insight:** The `.harness/` folder here is for building HQ itself. When HQ is complete, it will open and visualize `.harness/` folders from OTHER projects.

---

## Core Philosophy

> "A Single Pane of Glass for AI-Assisted Development"

HQ transforms the way developers interact with long-running AI agents by providing:
- **Visual Kanban boards** for feature tracking
- **Real-time logs** from all running processes
- **PTY-based process control** with full interactivity
- **Multi-project management** via tabs
- **Harness state visualization**

---

---

## Technology Stack

| Layer                | Technology          | Version | Purpose                              |
|----------------------|---------------------|---------|--------------------------------------|
| **Desktop Runtime**  | Tauri               | 2.x     | Native app shell, Rust backend       |
| **Frontend**         | React               | 19.x    | UI framework                         |
| **UI Components**    | PatternFly          | 6.x     | Enterprise UI (chat, terminal, logs) |
| **State Management** | @zazcart/tools      | 0.1.0   | State machine + schema validation    |
| **PTY Emulation**    | portable-pty (Rust) | latest  | Process spawning and control         |
| **File Watching**    | notify (Rust)       | latest  | Real-time harness file changes       |
| **IPC**              | Tauri Commands      | -       | Frontend вҶ” Backend communication     |

### Why PatternFly 6?

PatternFly provides ready-made components for our use cases:
- **Chat/AI components** - For agent communication UI
- **Log viewer** - Real-time log display with ANSI support
- **Terminal** - Embedded terminal views
- **Tabs** - Multi-project navigation
- **Cards/Panels** - Kanban board layout
- **Dark theme** - Built-in dark mode support

---

## Feature Specifications

### F001: Multi-Project Tab Management

**Description:** Open and manage multiple projects simultaneously via tabs.

**UI Elements:**
- Tab bar at top (PatternFly Tabs)
- New tab button (+)
- Close tab button (X)
- Tab context menu (rename, close others, close all)

**Behavior:**
- Each tab represents a project directory
- Tab title shows project name (from package.json or folder name)
- Active tab is highlighted
- Tabs are reorderable via drag-and-drop

### F002: Kanban Board View

**Description:** Visual kanban board for feature tracking within a project.

**Columns:**
```
BACKLOG вҶ’ TODO вҶ’ DOING вҶ’ REVIEW вҶ’ QA вҶ’ DONE
```

**Card Structure:**
- Feature ID (e.g., F001)
- Title
- Description (truncated)
- Status badge
- Priority indicator
- Click to expand details

**Data Source:**
- Reads from `.harness/features.json`
- Auto-updates when file changes (via file watcher)
- Status mapped to columns:
  - `passes: false` + not started вҶ’ BACKLOG
  - `passes: false` + priority вҶ’ TODO
  - `passes: false` + in_progress вҶ’ DOING
  - `passes: false` + needs_review вҶ’ REVIEW
  - `passes: false` + testing вҶ’ QA
  - `passes: true` вҶ’ DONE

### F003: Real-Time Log Panel

**Description:** Live output from running processes (Claude Code, servers, etc.)

**Features:**
- PatternFly LogViewer component
- ANSI color support
- Timestamp prefix
- Process filter
- Search within logs
- Clear button
- Auto-scroll toggle

**Technical:**
- PTY streams вҶ’ Tauri events вҶ’ React state
- Max 10,000 lines per process (ring buffer)

### F004: PTY Process Controller

**Description:** Spawn, control, and interact with shell processes.

**Capabilities:**
- Start new process (e.g., `claude` command)
- Send keystrokes (including Ctrl+C, Ctrl+D)
- Resize PTY on window resize
- Kill process
- Restart process

**Rust Implementation:**
```rust
use portable_pty::{CommandBuilder, PtySize, native_pty_system};

fn spawn_process(cmd: &str, cols: u16, rows: u16) -> Result<PtyPair> {
    let pty_system = native_pty_system();
    let pair = pty_system.openpty(PtySize { rows, cols, .. })?;
    let cmd = CommandBuilder::new(cmd);
    pair.slave.spawn_command(cmd)?;
    Ok(pair)
}
```

### F005: Harness State Visualization

**Description:** Display current harness state visually.

**Components:**
- Progress summary card
  - Features completed / total
  - Current session info
  - Last commit
- Active feature highlight
- Session timeline (from progress.txt)

### F006: Project Selector Dialog

**Description:** Open new project from file system.

**UI:**
- PatternFly Modal
- Recent projects list
- Browse button (native file picker via Tauri)
- Validate project (check for .harness folder)

### F007: Settings Panel

**Description:** Configure HQ preferences.

**Settings:**
- Theme (light/dark/system)
- Log buffer size
- Auto-start Claude Code
- Default shell
- Font size

---

## State Schema (using @zazcart/tools)

```typescript
import { Type, Static } from 'typebox';
import { createStore } from '@zazcart/tools';

// Project Schema
const ProjectSchema = Type.Object({
  id: Type.String(),
  path: Type.String(),
  name: Type.String(),
  harness: Type.Optional(Type.Object({
    progressFile: Type.String(),
    featuresFile: Type.String(),
  })),
});

// Feature Schema (from harness)
const FeatureSchema = Type.Object({
  id: Type.String(),
  description: Type.String(),
  category: Type.String(),
  passes: Type.Boolean(),
  steps: Type.Array(Type.String()),
});

// Process Schema
const ProcessSchema = Type.Object({
  id: Type.String(),
  projectId: Type.String(),
  command: Type.String(),
  status: Type.Union([
    Type.Literal('running'),
    Type.Literal('stopped'),
    Type.Literal('error'),
  ]),
  pid: Type.Optional(Type.Number()),
});

// App State
const AppStateSchema = Type.Object({
  activeTab: Type.String(),
  theme: Type.Union([
    Type.Literal('light'),
    Type.Literal('dark'),
    Type.Literal('system'),
  ]),
  projects: Type.Record(Type.String(), ProjectSchema),
  projectOrder: Type.Array(Type.String()),
  features: Type.Record(Type.String(), Type.Array(FeatureSchema)),
  processes: Type.Record(Type.String(), ProcessSchema),
});

type AppState = Static<typeof AppStateSchema>;
```

---

## Tauri Commands (IPC)

```typescript
// Frontend вҶ’ Backend commands
interface TauriCommands {
  'project:open': (path: string) => Promise<Project>;
  'project:close': (id: string) => Promise<void>;
  'pty:spawn': (projectId: string, cmd: string) => Promise<string>;
  'pty:write': (processId: string, data: string) => Promise<void>;
  'pty:resize': (processId: string, cols: number, rows: number) => Promise<void>;
  'pty:kill': (processId: string) => Promise<void>;
  'harness:read_features': (path: string) => Promise<Feature[]>;
  'harness:watch': (projectPath: string) => Promise<void>;
  'fs:select_directory': () => Promise<string | null>;
}

// Backend вҶ’ Frontend events
interface TauriEvents {
  'pty:output': { processId: string; data: string };
  'pty:exit': { processId: string; code: number };
  'harness:changed': { projectPath: string; file: string };
}
```

```

в”ңв”Җв”Җ package.json
в”ңв”Җв”Җ vite.config.ts
в”ңв”Җв”Җ CLAUDE.md
в””в”Җв”Җ README.md
```

content.text:
## HQ - Harness Orchestrator & Dashboard

### O que faz

**HQ** Г© uma aplicaГ§ГЈo desktop nativa para **gerenciar sessГөes de desenvolvimento com agentes de IA** (como o Claude Code). Funciona como um "centro de comando" visual.

**Problema que resolve:** Quando se usa agentes de IA para desenvolvimento, cada nova sessГЈo comeГ§a **sem memГіria** das sessГөes anteriores. Гү difГӯcil acompanhar o progresso de mГәltiplos projetos via terminal.

**SoluГ§ГЈo:** HQ oferece:

| Funcionalidade | DescriГ§ГЈo |
|----------------|-----------|
| **Kanban visual** | Board com colunas BACKLOG вҶ’ TODO вҶ’ DOING вҶ’ REVIEW вҶ’ QA вҶ’ DONE |
| **Logs em tempo real** | Output de processos com cores ANSI |
| **Controle PTY** | Spawn e controle interativo de processos shell |
| **Multi-projeto** | Abas para gerenciar vГЎrios projetos simultaneamente |
| **VisualizaГ§ГЈo Harness** | Exibe estado dos arquivos `.harness/` |

### Como funciona

```

в”Ӯ                                                     в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ BACKLOG в”Ӯ  TODO   в”Ӯ  DOING  в”Ӯ  DONE   в”Ӯ Kanban  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  F002   в”Ӯ  F001   в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ                                                     в”Ӯ

в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө

в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### Stack tГ©cnico

| Camada | Tecnologia | Motivo |
|--------|------------|--------|
| Desktop | **Tauri 2.x** | App nativo, backend Rust |
| Frontend | **React 19** | UI moderna |
| Componentes | **PatternFly 6** | LogViewer, Tabs, Cards prontos |
| Estado | **@zazcart/tools** | State machine sem stale closures |
| PTY | **portable-pty** (Rust) | Controle de processos |
| Watch | **notify** (Rust) | Detectar mudanГ§as em `.harness/` |

### O conceito de Harness

O projeto usa o padrГЈo **Harness** da Anthropic:

```
.harness/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ progress.txt    вҶҗ HistГіrico de sessГөes
в””в”Җв”Җ features.json   вҶҗ Features com status (passes: true/false)
```

1вҶ’# @belt/tools 2вҶ’ 3вҶ’A TypeScript utility library providing runtime type validation, state management, and common helpers for complex frontend applications including WebGL/game loops requiring high-performance state management. 4вҶ’ 5вҶ’## Installation 6вҶ’ 7вҶ’```bash 8вҶ’npm install @belt/tools 9вҶ’# or 10вҶ’pnpm add @belt/tools 11вҶ’``` 12вҶ’ 13вҶ’**Peer Dependencies:** 14вҶ’- `react` >= 18.0.0 (optional, only for state-machine hooks) 15вҶ’ 16вҶ’## Quick Start 17вҶ’ 18вҶ’### Schema Validation 19вҶ’ 20вҶ’```typescript 21вҶ’import { createModel, createType, InferType, isType } from '@belt/tools'; 22вҶ’ 23вҶ’// Create a validated model 24вҶ’const UserSchema = createModel({ 25вҶ’ id: 'number', 26вҶ’ name: 'string', 27вҶ’ email: 'string?', // optional 28вҶ’ roles: 'string[]', // array 29вҶ’}); 30вҶ’ 31вҶ’type User = InferType; 32вҶ’ 33вҶ’// Parse and validate data 34вҶ’const user = UserSchema.parse({ 35вҶ’ id: 1, 36вҶ’ name: 'John', 37вҶ’ roles: ['admin'], 38вҶ’}); 39вҶ’ 40вҶ’// Type guard 41вҶ’if (isType(someValue, 'number')) { 42вҶ’ console.log(someValue.toFixed(2)); // TypeScript knows it's a number 43вҶ’} 44вҶ’``` 45вҶ’ 46вҶ’### State Machine 47вҶ’ 48вҶ’```typescript 49вҶ’import { createMachine, createSlice } from '@belt/tools'; 50вҶ’ 51вҶ’// Create a slice 52вҶ’const counterSlice = createSlice({ 53вҶ’ id: 'counter', 54вҶ’ initial: { count: 0 }, 55вҶ’ cache: { policy: 'session' }, 56вҶ’ reducers: { 57вҶ’ increment: (state) => { state.count += 1; }, 58вҶ’ decrement: (state) => { state.count -= 1; }, 59вҶ’ set: (state, value: number) => { state.count = value; }, 60вҶ’ }, 61вҶ’}); 62вҶ’ 63вҶ’// Create the machine 64вҶ’const appMachine = createMachine({ 65вҶ’ id: 'app', 66вҶ’ slices: { counter: counterSlice }, 67вҶ’ context: { userID: null }, 68вҶ’}); 69вҶ’ 70вҶ’// Use in React components 71вҶ’function Counter() { 72вҶ’ const { state, actions } = appMachine.useMachine('counter'); 73вҶ’ 74вҶ’ return ( 75вҶ’
76вҶ’ {state.count} 77вҶ’ 78вҶ’ 79вҶ’
80вҶ’ ); 81вҶ’} 82вҶ’``` 83вҶ’ 84вҶ’### Helpers 85вҶ’ 86вҶ’```typescript 87вҶ’import { 88вҶ’ getProperty, 89вҶ’ ms, 90вҶ’ formatDate, 91вҶ’ invariant, 92вҶ’ tryCatch, 93вҶ’} from '@belt/tools'; 94вҶ’ 95вҶ’// Deep property access 96вҶ’const street = getProperty(user, 'address.street'); 97вҶ’ 98вҶ’// Time conversion 99вҶ’const timeout = ms('5m'); // 300000 (5 minutes in ms) 100вҶ’ 101вҶ’// Date formatting 102вҶ’const formatted = formatDate(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd'); // '2025-12-28' 103вҶ’ 104вҶ’// Assertions 105вҶ’invariant(user.id, 'User ID is required'); 106вҶ’ 107вҶ’// Safe error handling 108вҶ’const [error, result] = tryCatch(() => JSON.parse(data)); 109вҶ’if (error) { 110вҶ’ console.error('Parse failed:', error.message); 111вҶ’} 112вҶ’``` 113вҶ’ 114вҶ’## Modules 115вҶ’ 116вҶ’### Schema Module 117вҶ’ 118вҶ’Runtime type validation with TypeBox under the hood. 119вҶ’ 120вҶ’- `createType(definition)` - Create a compiled type validator 121вҶ’- `createModel(properties)` - Convenience function for object schemas 122вҶ’- `isType(value, definition)` - Type guard 123вҶ’- `invariantType(definition, value)` - Assertion 124вҶ’ 125вҶ’### State Machine Module 126вҶ’ 127вҶ’Redux-like state management with React hooks and Immer. 128вҶ’ 129вҶ’- `createMachine(config)` - Create a state machine 130вҶ’- `createSlice(config)` - Create a synchronous slice 131вҶ’- `createAsyncSlice(config)` - Create an async slice for data fetching 132вҶ’- Cache policies: `public`, `private`, `session` 133вҶ’ 134вҶ’### Helpers Module 135вҶ’ 136вҶ’Pure utility functions: 137вҶ’ 138вҶ’- Object utilities: `objectKeys`, `objectEntries`, `getProperty`, `setProperty`, `keyBy` 139вҶ’- Error utilities: `invariant`, `tryCatch`, `InvariantError` 140вҶ’- String utilities: `isString`, `assertString`, `capitalize` 141вҶ’- Time utilities: `ms`, `delay`, `formatDate` 142вҶ’- Other: `createProxy`, `maskData`, `getTypeOf` 143вҶ’ 144вҶ’### Type Utils Module 145вҶ’ 146вҶ’TypeScript utility types: 147вҶ’ 148вҶ’- `Writable` - Remove readonly modifiers 149вҶ’- `Compute` - Flatten intersection types 150вҶ’- `Paths` - All dot-notation paths of object 151вҶ’- `PathType` - Type at specific path 152вҶ’- `Falsy` - Union of falsy values 153вҶ’- `UnionToIntersection` - Convert union to intersection 154вҶ’ 155вҶ’ Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. 1вҶ’# HQ - Harness Orchestrator & Dashboard

     3вҶ’## Vision
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’**HQ** (Headquarters) is a native desktop application that provides a visual dashboard for managing AI agent development sessions. It enables developers to orchestrate, monitor, and control multiple Claude Code sessions across different projects without using a terminal.
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’## Important Distinction: Three Separate Concepts

    14вҶ’| **HQ in development** | This project is being BUILT using the Harness method | The `.harness/` folder in THIS repo |
    15вҶ’| **HQ as product** | Once built, HQ will MANAGE other projects that use Harness | Visual dashboard for external projects |
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’**Key insight:** The `.harness/` folder here is for building HQ itself. When HQ is complete, it will open and visualize `.harness/` folders from OTHER projects.

    67вҶ’```

    70вҶ’
    71вҶ’## Technology Stack
    72вҶ’
    73вҶ’| Layer                | Technology          | Version | Purpose                              |
    74вҶ’|----------------------|---------------------|---------|--------------------------------------|
    75вҶ’| **Desktop Runtime**  | Tauri               | 2.x     | Native app shell, Rust backend       |
    76вҶ’| **Frontend**         | React               | 19.x    | UI framework                         |
    77вҶ’| **UI Components**    | PatternFly          | 6.x     | Enterprise UI (chat, terminal, logs) |
    78вҶ’| **State Management** | @zazcart/tools      | 0.1.0   | State machine + schema validation    |
    79вҶ’| **PTY Emulation**    | portable-pty (Rust) | latest  | Process spawning and control         |
    80вҶ’| **File Watching**    | notify (Rust)       | latest  | Real-time harness file changes       |
    81вҶ’| **IPC**              | Tauri Commands      | -       | Frontend вҶ” Backend communication     |
    82вҶ’
    83вҶ’### Why PatternFly 6?
    84вҶ’
    85вҶ’PatternFly provides ready-made components for our use cases:
    86вҶ’- **Chat/AI components** - For agent communication UI
    87вҶ’- **Log viewer** - Real-time log display with ANSI support
    88вҶ’- **Terminal** - Embedded terminal views
    89вҶ’- **Tabs** - Multi-project navigation
    90вҶ’- **Cards/Panels** - Kanban board layout
    91вҶ’- **Dark theme** - Built-in dark mode support
    92вҶ’
    93вҶ’---
    94вҶ’
    95вҶ’## Feature Specifications
    96вҶ’
    97вҶ’### F001: Multi-Project Tab Management
    98вҶ’
    99вҶ’**Description:** Open and manage multiple projects simultaneously via tabs.
   100вҶ’
   101вҶ’**UI Elements:**
   102вҶ’- Tab bar at top (PatternFly Tabs)
   103вҶ’- New tab button (+)
   104вҶ’- Close tab button (X)
   105вҶ’- Tab context menu (rename, close others, close all)
   106вҶ’
   107вҶ’**Behavior:**
   108вҶ’- Each tab represents a project directory
   109вҶ’- Tab title shows project name (from package.json or folder name)
   110вҶ’- Active tab is highlighted
   111вҶ’- Tabs are reorderable via drag-and-drop
   112вҶ’
   113вҶ’### F002: Kanban Board View
   114вҶ’
   115вҶ’**Description:** Visual kanban board for feature tracking within a project.
   116вҶ’
   117вҶ’**Columns:**
   118вҶ’```
   119вҶ’BACKLOG вҶ’ TODO вҶ’ DOING вҶ’ REVIEW вҶ’ QA вҶ’ DONE
   120вҶ’```
   121вҶ’
   122вҶ’**Card Structure:**
   123вҶ’- Feature ID (e.g., F001)
   124вҶ’- Title
   125вҶ’- Description (truncated)
   126вҶ’- Status badge
   127вҶ’- Priority indicator
   128вҶ’- Click to expand details
   129вҶ’
   130вҶ’**Data Source:**
   131вҶ’- Reads from `.harness/features.json`
   132вҶ’- Auto-updates when file changes (via file watcher)
   133вҶ’- Status mapped to columns:
   134вҶ’  - `passes: false` + not started вҶ’ BACKLOG
   135вҶ’  - `passes: false` + priority вҶ’ TODO
   136вҶ’  - `passes: false` + in_progress вҶ’ DOING
   137вҶ’  - `passes: false` + needs_review вҶ’ REVIEW
   138вҶ’  - `passes: false` + testing вҶ’ QA
   139вҶ’  - `passes: true` вҶ’ DONE
   140вҶ’
   141вҶ’### F003: Real-Time Log Panel
   142вҶ’
   143вҶ’**Description:** Live output from running processes (Claude Code, servers, etc.)
   144вҶ’
   145вҶ’**Features:**
   146вҶ’- PatternFly LogViewer component
   147вҶ’- ANSI color support
   148вҶ’- Timestamp prefix
   149вҶ’- Process filter
   150вҶ’- Search within logs
   151вҶ’- Clear button
   152вҶ’- Auto-scroll toggle
   153вҶ’
   154вҶ’**Technical:**
   155вҶ’- PTY streams вҶ’ Tauri events вҶ’ React state
   156вҶ’- Max 10,000 lines per process (ring buffer)
   157вҶ’
   158вҶ’### F004: PTY Process Controller
   159вҶ’
   160вҶ’**Description:** Spawn, control, and interact with shell processes.
   161вҶ’
   162вҶ’**Capabilities:**
   163вҶ’- Start new process (e.g., `claude` command)
   164вҶ’- Send keystrokes (including Ctrl+C, Ctrl+D)
   165вҶ’- Resize PTY on window resize
   166вҶ’- Kill process
   167вҶ’- Restart process
   168вҶ’
   169вҶ’**Rust Implementation:**
   170вҶ’```rust
   171вҶ’use portable_pty::{CommandBuilder, PtySize, native_pty_system};
   172вҶ’
   173вҶ’fn spawn_process(cmd: &str, cols: u16, rows: u16) -> Result<PtyPair> {
   174вҶ’    let pty_system = native_pty_system();
   175вҶ’    let pair = pty_system.openpty(PtySize { rows, cols, .. })?;
   176вҶ’    let cmd = CommandBuilder::new(cmd);
   177вҶ’    pair.slave.spawn_command(cmd)?;
   178вҶ’    Ok(pair)
   179вҶ’}
   180вҶ’```
   181вҶ’
   182вҶ’### F005: Harness State Visualization
   183вҶ’
   184вҶ’**Description:** Display current harness state visually.
   185вҶ’
   186вҶ’**Components:**
   187вҶ’- Progress summary card
   188вҶ’  - Features completed / total
   189вҶ’  - Current session info
   190вҶ’  - Last commit
   191вҶ’- Active feature highlight
   192вҶ’- Session timeline (from progress.txt)
   193вҶ’
   194вҶ’### F006: Project Selector Dialog
   195вҶ’
   196вҶ’**Description:** Open new project from file system.
   197вҶ’
   198вҶ’**UI:**
   199вҶ’- PatternFly Modal
   200вҶ’- Recent projects list
   201вҶ’- Browse button (native file picker via Tauri)
   202вҶ’- Validate project (check for .harness folder)
   203вҶ’
   204вҶ’### F007: Settings Panel
   205вҶ’
   206вҶ’**Description:** Configure HQ preferences.
   207вҶ’
   208вҶ’**Settings:**
   209вҶ’- Theme (light/dark/system)
   210вҶ’- Log buffer size
   211вҶ’- Auto-start Claude Code
   212вҶ’- Default shell
   213вҶ’- Font size
   214вҶ’
   215вҶ’---
   216вҶ’
   217вҶ’## State Schema (using @zazcart/tools)
   218вҶ’
   219вҶ’```typescript
   220вҶ’import { Type, Static } from 'typebox';
   221вҶ’import { createStore } from '@zazcart/tools';
   222вҶ’
   223вҶ’// Project Schema
   224вҶ’const ProjectSchema = Type.Object({
   225вҶ’  id: Type.String(),
   226вҶ’  path: Type.String(),
   227вҶ’  name: Type.String(),
   228вҶ’  harness: Type.Optional(Type.Object({
   229вҶ’    progressFile: Type.String(),
   230вҶ’    featuresFile: Type.String(),
   231вҶ’  })),
   232вҶ’});
   233вҶ’
   234вҶ’// Feature Schema (from harness)
   235вҶ’const FeatureSchema = Type.Object({
   236вҶ’  id: Type.String(),
   237вҶ’  description: Type.String(),
   238вҶ’  category: Type.String(),
   239вҶ’  passes: Type.Boolean(),
   240вҶ’  steps: Type.Array(Type.String()),
   241вҶ’});
   242вҶ’
   243вҶ’// Process Schema
   244вҶ’const ProcessSchema = Type.Object({
   245вҶ’  id: Type.String(),
   246вҶ’  projectId: Type.String(),
   247вҶ’  command: Type.String(),
   248вҶ’  status: Type.Union([
   249вҶ’    Type.Literal('running'),
   250вҶ’    Type.Literal('stopped'),
   251вҶ’    Type.Literal('error'),
   252вҶ’  ]),
   253вҶ’  pid: Type.Optional(Type.Number()),
   254вҶ’});
   255вҶ’
   256вҶ’// App State
   257вҶ’const AppStateSchema = Type.Object({
   258вҶ’  activeTab: Type.String(),
   259вҶ’  theme: Type.Union([
   260вҶ’    Type.Literal('light'),
   261вҶ’    Type.Literal('dark'),
   262вҶ’    Type.Literal('system'),
   263вҶ’  ]),
   264вҶ’  projects: Type.Record(Type.String(), ProjectSchema),
   265вҶ’  projectOrder: Type.Array(Type.String()),
   266вҶ’  features: Type.Record(Type.String(), Type.Array(FeatureSchema)),
   267вҶ’  processes: Type.Record(Type.String(), ProcessSchema),
   268вҶ’});
   269вҶ’
   270вҶ’type AppState = Static<typeof AppStateSchema>;
   271вҶ’```
   272вҶ’
   273вҶ’---
   274вҶ’
   275вҶ’## Tauri Commands (IPC)

# HQ - Harness Orchestrator & Dashboard

## Vision

**HQ** (Headquarters) is a native desktop application that provides a visual dashboard for managing AI agent development sessions. It enables developers to orchestrate, monitor, and control multiple Claude Code sessions across different projects without using a terminal.

## Important Distinction: Three Separate Concepts

Understanding HQ requires separating three distinct concepts:

| Concept | What It Is | Example |
|---------|------------|---------|
| **Harness (method)** | A pattern for AI agents to work on long tasks across sessions via state files | `.harness/progress.txt` + `features.json` |
| **HQ in development** | This project is being BUILT using the Harness method | The `.harness/` folder in THIS repo |
| **HQ as product** | Once built, HQ will MANAGE other projects that use Harness | Visual dashboard for external projects |

**Key insight:** The `.harness/` folder here is for building HQ itself. When HQ is complete, it will open and visualize `.harness/` folders from OTHER projects.

---

## Core Philosophy

> "A Single Pane of Glass for AI-Assisted Development"

HQ transforms the way developers interact with long-running AI agents by providing:
- **Visual Kanban boards** for feature tracking
- **Real-time logs** from all running processes
- **PTY-based process control** with full interactivity
- **Multi-project management** via tabs
- **Harness state visualization**

---

## Architecture Overview

```

в”Ӯ                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ

---

## Technology Stack

| Layer                | Technology          | Version | Purpose                              |
|----------------------|---------------------|---------|--------------------------------------|
| **Desktop Runtime**  | Tauri               | 2.x     | Native app shell, Rust backend       |
| **Frontend**         | React               | 19.x    | UI framework                         |
| **UI Components**    | PatternFly          | 6.x     | Enterprise UI (chat, terminal, logs) |
| **State Management** | @zazcart/tools      | 0.1.0   | State machine + schema validation    |
| **PTY Emulation**    | portable-pty (Rust) | latest  | Process spawning and control         |
| **File Watching**    | notify (Rust)       | latest  | Real-time harness file changes       |
| **IPC**              | Tauri Commands      | -       | Frontend вҶ” Backend communication     |

### Why PatternFly 6?

PatternFly provides ready-made components for our use cases:
- **Chat/AI components** - For agent communication UI
- **Log viewer** - Real-time log display with ANSI support
- **Terminal** - Embedded terminal views
- **Tabs** - Multi-project navigation
- **Cards/Panels** - Kanban board layout
- **Dark theme** - Built-in dark mode support

---

## Feature Specifications

### F001: Multi-Project Tab Management

**Description:** Open and manage multiple projects simultaneously via tabs.

**UI Elements:**
- Tab bar at top (PatternFly Tabs)
- New tab button (+)
- Close tab button (X)
- Tab context menu (rename, close others, close all)

**Behavior:**
- Each tab represents a project directory
- Tab title shows project name (from package.json or folder name)
- Active tab is highlighted
- Tabs are reorderable via drag-and-drop

### F002: Kanban Board View

**Description:** Visual kanban board for feature tracking within a project.

**Columns:**
```
BACKLOG вҶ’ TODO вҶ’ DOING вҶ’ REVIEW вҶ’ QA вҶ’ DONE
```

**Card Structure:**
- Feature ID (e.g., F001)
- Title
- Description (truncated)
- Status badge
- Priority indicator
- Click to expand details

**Data Source:**
- Reads from `.harness/features.json`
- Auto-updates when file changes (via file watcher)
- Status mapped to columns:
  - `passes: false` + not started вҶ’ BACKLOG
  - `passes: false` + priority вҶ’ TODO
  - `passes: false` + in_progress вҶ’ DOING
  - `passes: false` + needs_review вҶ’ REVIEW
  - `passes: false` + testing вҶ’ QA
  - `passes: true` вҶ’ DONE

### F003: Real-Time Log Panel

**Description:** Live output from running processes (Claude Code, servers, etc.)

**Features:**
- PatternFly LogViewer component
- ANSI color support
- Timestamp prefix
- Process filter
- Search within logs
- Clear button
- Auto-scroll toggle

**Technical:**
- PTY streams вҶ’ Tauri events вҶ’ React state
- Max 10,000 lines per process (ring buffer)

### F004: PTY Process Controller

**Description:** Spawn, control, and interact with shell processes.

**Capabilities:**
- Start new process (e.g., `claude` command)
- Send keystrokes (including Ctrl+C, Ctrl+D)
- Resize PTY on window resize
- Kill process
- Restart process

**Rust Implementation:**
```rust
use portable_pty::{CommandBuilder, PtySize, native_pty_system};

fn spawn_process(cmd: &str, cols: u16, rows: u16) -> Result<PtyPair> {
    let pty_system = native_pty_system();
    let pair = pty_system.openpty(PtySize { rows, cols, .. })?;
    let cmd = CommandBuilder::new(cmd);
    pair.slave.spawn_command(cmd)?;
    Ok(pair)
}
```

### F005: Harness State Visualization

**Description:** Display current harness state visually.

**Components:**
- Progress summary card
  - Features completed / total
  - Current session info
  - Last commit
- Active feature highlight
- Session timeline (from progress.txt)

### F006: Project Selector Dialog

**Description:** Open new project from file system.

**UI:**
- PatternFly Modal
- Recent projects list
- Browse button (native file picker via Tauri)
- Validate project (check for .harness folder)

### F007: Settings Panel

**Description:** Configure HQ preferences.

**Settings:**
- Theme (light/dark/system)
- Log buffer size
- Auto-start Claude Code
- Default shell
- Font size

---

## State Schema (using @zazcart/tools)

```typescript
import { Type, Static } from 'typebox';
import { createStore } from '@zazcart/tools';

// Project Schema
const ProjectSchema = Type.Object({
  id: Type.String(),
  path: Type.String(),
  name: Type.String(),
  harness: Type.Optional(Type.Object({
    progressFile: Type.String(),
    featuresFile: Type.String(),
  })),
});

// Feature Schema (from harness)
const FeatureSchema = Type.Object({
  id: Type.String(),
  description: Type.String(),
  category: Type.String(),
  passes: Type.Boolean(),
  steps: Type.Array(Type.String()),
});

// Process Schema
const ProcessSchema = Type.Object({
  id: Type.String(),
  projectId: Type.String(),
  command: Type.String(),
  status: Type.Union([
    Type.Literal('running'),
    Type.Literal('stopped'),
    Type.Literal('error'),
  ]),
  pid: Type.Optional(Type.Number()),
});

// App State
const AppStateSchema = Type.Object({
  activeTab: Type.String(),
  theme: Type.Union([
    Type.Literal('light'),
    Type.Literal('dark'),
    Type.Literal('system'),
  ]),
  projects: Type.Record(Type.String(), ProjectSchema),
  projectOrder: Type.Array(Type.String()),
  features: Type.Record(Type.String(), Type.Array(FeatureSchema)),
  processes: Type.Record(Type.String(), ProcessSchema),
});

type AppState = Static<typeof AppStateSchema>;
```

---

## Tauri Commands (IPC)

```typescript
// Frontend вҶ’ Backend commands
interface TauriCommands {
  'project:open': (path: string) => Promise<Project>;

  'pty:resize': (processId: string, cols: number, rows: number) => Promise<void>;
  'pty:kill': (processId: string) => Promise<void>;
  'harness:read_features': (path: string) => Promise<Feature[]>;
  'harness:watch': (projectPath: string) => Promise<void>;
  'fs:select_directory': () => Promise<string | null>;
}

// Backend вҶ’ Frontend events
interface TauriEvents {
  'pty:output': { processId: string; data: string };
  'pty:exit': { processId: string; code: number };
  'harness:changed': { projectPath: string; file: string };
}
```

# HQ - Harness Orchestrator & Dashboard

## Vision

**HQ** (Headquarters) is a native desktop application that provides a visual dashboard for managing AI agent development sessions. It enables developers to orchestrate, monitor, and control multiple Claude Code sessions across different projects without using a terminal.

## Important Distinction: Three Separate Concepts

Understanding HQ requires separating three distinct concepts:

| Concept | What It Is | Example |
|---------|------------|---------|
| **Harness (method)** | A pattern for AI agents to work on long tasks across sessions via state files | `.harness/progress.txt` + `features.json` |
| **HQ in development** | This project is being BUILT using the Harness method | The `.harness/` folder in THIS repo |
| **HQ as product** | Once built, HQ will MANAGE other projects that use Harness | Visual dashboard for external projects |

**Key insight:** The `.harness/` folder here is for building HQ itself. When HQ is complete, it will open and visualize `.harness/` folders from OTHER projects.

---

## Core Philosophy

> "A Single Pane of Glass for AI-Assisted Development"

HQ transforms the way developers interact with long-running AI agents by providing:
- **Visual Kanban boards** for feature tracking
- **Real-time logs** from all running processes
- **PTY-based process control** with full interactivity
- **Multi-project management** via tabs
- **Harness state visualization**

---

## Technology Stack

| Layer                | Technology          | Version | Purpose                              |
|----------------------|---------------------|---------|--------------------------------------|
| **Desktop Runtime**  | Tauri               | 2.x     | Native app shell, Rust backend       |
| **Frontend**         | React               | 19.x    | UI framework                         |
| **UI Components**    | PatternFly          | 6.x     | Enterprise UI (chat, terminal, logs) |
| **State Management** | @zazcart/tools      | 0.1.0   | State machine + schema validation    |
| **PTY Emulation**    | portable-pty (Rust) | latest  | Process spawning and control         |
| **File Watching**    | notify (Rust)       | latest  | Real-time harness file changes       |
| **IPC**              | Tauri Commands      | -       | Frontend вҶ” Backend communication     |

### Why PatternFly 6?

PatternFly provides ready-made components for our use cases:
- **Chat/AI components** - For agent communication UI
- **Log viewer** - Real-time log display with ANSI support
- **Terminal** - Embedded terminal views
- **Tabs** - Multi-project navigation
- **Cards/Panels** - Kanban board layout
- **Dark theme** - Built-in dark mode support

---

## Feature Specifications

### F001: Multi-Project Tab Management

**Description:** Open and manage multiple projects simultaneously via tabs.

**UI Elements:**
- Tab bar at top (PatternFly Tabs)
- New tab button (+)
- Close tab button (X)
- Tab context menu (rename, close others, close all)

**Behavior:**
- Each tab represents a project directory
- Tab title shows project name (from package.json or folder name)
- Active tab is highlighted
- Tabs are reorderable via drag-and-drop

### F002: Kanban Board View

**Description:** Visual kanban board for feature tracking within a project.

**Columns:**
```
BACKLOG вҶ’ TODO вҶ’ DOING вҶ’ REVIEW вҶ’ QA вҶ’ DONE
```

**Card Structure:**
- Feature ID (e.g., F001)
- Title
- Description (truncated)
- Status badge
- Priority indicator
- Click to expand details

**Data Source:**
- Reads from `.harness/features.json`
- Auto-updates when file changes (via file watcher)
- Status mapped to columns:
  - `passes: false` + not started вҶ’ BACKLOG
  - `passes: false` + priority вҶ’ TODO
  - `passes: false` + in_progress вҶ’ DOING
  - `passes: false` + needs_review вҶ’ REVIEW
  - `passes: false` + testing вҶ’ QA
  - `passes: true` вҶ’ DONE

### F003: Real-Time Log Panel

**Description:** Live output from running processes (Claude Code, servers, etc.)

**Features:**
- PatternFly LogViewer component
- ANSI color support
- Timestamp prefix
- Process filter
- Search within logs
- Clear button
- Auto-scroll toggle

**Technical:**
- PTY streams вҶ’ Tauri events вҶ’ React state
- Max 10,000 lines per process (ring buffer)

### F004: PTY Process Controller

**Description:** Spawn, control, and interact with shell processes.

**Capabilities:**
- Start new process (e.g., `claude` command)
- Send keystrokes (including Ctrl+C, Ctrl+D)
- Resize PTY on window resize
- Kill process
- Restart process

**Rust Implementation:**
```rust
use portable_pty::{CommandBuilder, PtySize, native_pty_system};

fn spawn_process(cmd: &str, cols: u16, rows: u16) -> Result<PtyPair> {
    let pty_system = native_pty_system();
    let pair = pty_system.openpty(PtySize { rows, cols, .. })?;
    let cmd = CommandBuilder::new(cmd);
    pair.slave.spawn_command(cmd)?;
    Ok(pair)
}
```

### F005: Harness State Visualization

**Description:** Display current harness state visually.

**Components:**
- Progress summary card
  - Features completed / total
  - Current session info
  - Last commit
- Active feature highlight
- Session timeline (from progress.txt)

### F006: Project Selector Dialog

**Description:** Open new project from file system.

**UI:**
- PatternFly Modal
- Recent projects list
- Browse button (native file picker via Tauri)
- Validate project (check for .harness folder)

### F007: Settings Panel

**Description:** Configure HQ preferences.

**Settings:**
- Theme (light/dark/system)
- Log buffer size
- Auto-start Claude Code
- Default shell
- Font size

## State Schema (using @zazcart/tools)

```typescript
import { Type, Static } from 'typebox';
import { createStore } from '@zazcart/tools';

// Project Schema
const ProjectSchema = Type.Object({
  id: Type.String(),
  path: Type.String(),
  name: Type.String(),
  harness: Type.Optional(Type.Object({
    progressFile: Type.String(),
    featuresFile: Type.String(),
  })),
});

// Feature Schema (from harness)
const FeatureSchema = Type.Object({
  id: Type.String(),
  description: Type.String(),
  category: Type.String(),
  passes: Type.Boolean(),
  steps: Type.Array(Type.String()),
});

// Process Schema
const ProcessSchema = Type.Object({
  id: Type.String(),
  projectId: Type.String(),
  command: Type.String(),
  status: Type.Union([
    Type.Literal('running'),
    Type.Literal('stopped'),
    Type.Literal('error'),
  ]),
  pid: Type.Optional(Type.Number()),
});

// App State
const AppStateSchema = Type.Object({
  activeTab: Type.String(),
  theme: Type.Union([
    Type.Literal('light'),
    Type.Literal('dark'),
    Type.Literal('system'),
  ]),
  projects: Type.Record(Type.String(), ProjectSchema),
  projectOrder: Type.Array(Type.String()),
  features: Type.Record(Type.String(), Type.Array(FeatureSchema)),
  processes: Type.Record(Type.String(), ProcessSchema),
});

type AppState = Static<typeof AppStateSchema>;
```

## Tauri Commands (IPC)

```typescript
// Frontend вҶ’ Backend commands
interface TauriCommands {
  'project:open': (path: string) => Promise<Project>;
  'project:close': (id: string) => Promise<void>;
  'pty:spawn': (projectId: string, cmd: string) => Promise<string>;
  'pty:write': (processId: string, data: string) => Promise<void>;
  'pty:resize': (processId: string, cols: number, rows: number) => Promise<void>;
  'pty:kill': (processId: string) => Promise<void>;
  'harness:read_features': (path: string) => Promise<Feature[]>;
  'harness:watch': (projectPath: string) => Promise<void>;
  'fs:select_directory': () => Promise<string | null>;
}

// Backend вҶ’ Frontend events
interface TauriEvents {
  'pty:output': { processId: string; data: string };
  'pty:exit': { processId: string; code: number };
  'harness:changed': { projectPath: string; file: string };
}
```
